creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
The announcement message states that this is a security fix release, but not
much else:

  "Welcome to phpMyAdmin 2.11.7.1, a security fix version.

   The security announcement will follow on http://www.phpmyadmin.net.

   The release notes and download info are available on
   http://www.phpmyadmin.net.

   Marc Delisle, for the team."

No advisories seem to be available yet.  Release notes are at:

   http://www.phpmyadmin.net/home_page/downloads.php?relnotes=0
